The '''''Raptor''''' was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Stark Commercial Combine]].

==History==
Its captain was [[Zur (Zabrak)|Zur]] and one of its bridge officers was [[Shorshone]]. The ''Raptor'' led the assault on the remains of [[Ranulph Tarkin/Legends|Ranulph Tarkin's]] [[Outland Regions Security Force/Legends|personal fleet]] that survived the [[Navcomputer virus|navicomputer virus]] to arrive at [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]], and headed the blockade that prevented the survivors from escaping.

[[File:RaptorStark.jpg|thumb|left|The ''Raptor's'' demise.]]

During the [[Fifth Battle of Qotile]], [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] and [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] infiltrated the ''Raptor'' to broadcast the patch that would fix the navicomputer virus's corruption, and set the ship's [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] to lower if ordered to be activated. After doing so, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] escaped on one of its fighters as [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin's]] Jedi [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] destroyed the ship.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 39|''Star Wars'' (1998) 39]] {{Flash}}
